themes: Discovering that what others see as a flaw may be what makes someone special
projects.progress_notes: Currently being queried to literary agents and seeking traditional publishing.
projects.title: The Whisperer and the Great Moon Flower
projects.short_description: The Whisperer and the Great Moon Flower is a heartfelt picture book about Dan, a young Whisperer who is mocked for his giant ears. When a devastating flood threatens his forest community, Dan must learn to believe in himself and use the very thing everyone laughed at to save them.
projects.long_description: The Whisperer and the Great Moon Flower is a heartfelt picture book about Dan, a young Whisperer who is mocked for his giant ears. When a devastating flood threatens his forest community, Dan must learn to believe in himself and use the very thing everyone laughed at to save them.
projects.disclaimer: Visual artwork shown here is inspiration only. Final illustration direction may be guided by a future publisher.

projects.progress_notes: In active development. Working title and further details to come.
projects.title: The Fang: Unlocking the Blood of the Beast
projects.short_description:
In this world, vampires do not simply drink blood to survive. They drink to become something more.

For centuries, hidden beneath the familiar legends of fangs, darkness, and immortality, a deeper truth has existed: the blood of beasts carries power. Strength. Speed. Sight. Instinct. Every choice of blood can unlock something different, and every vampire who understands it holds a weapon inside their veins.

Through the eyes of Sir Gregory, the old world begins to reveal its secrets, exposing a history shaped by hunger, power, restraint, and the dangerous gifts carried in the blood. But as the past gives way to a new era, one young woman will discover that the myths she never understood are not only real, they are tied to her in ways she never imagined.

As ancient rules begin to fracture and buried truths come to light, she must step into a world where blood is more than survival. It is power. It is legacy. And it may be the only thing standing between her and the darkness waiting to claim everything.
projects.long_description:
In this world, vampires do not simply drink blood to survive. They drink to become something more.

For centuries, hidden beneath the familiar legends of fangs, darkness, and immortality, a deeper truth has existed: the blood of beasts carries power. Strength. Speed. Sight. Instinct. Every choice of blood can unlock something different, and every vampire who understands it holds a weapon inside their veins.

Through the eyes of Sir Gregory, the old world begins to reveal its secrets, exposing a history shaped by hunger, power, restraint, and the dangerous gifts carried in the blood. But as the past gives way to a new era, one young woman will discover that the myths she never understood are not only real, they are tied to her in ways she never imagined.

As ancient rules begin to fracture and buried truths come to light, she must step into a world where blood is more than survival. It is power. It is legacy. And it may be the only thing standing between her and the darkness waiting to claim everything.
